rawCommits.subject: chore(server): log agent stream output summaries
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: fix(specs): preserve timed-out spec drafts
rawCommits.body:
Keep streamed spec markdown recoverable when a model timeout interrupts create_spec and steer agents away from oversized spec payloads.

Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: fix(desktop): fail closed on unhealthy harness sidecar
rawCommits.body:
Kill the managed local harness process when it never passes the startup health probe so the desktop does not proceed with a broken sidecar.

Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: fail closed on unhealthy harness sidecar

rawCommits.subject: fix(interface): reduce task output persistence jank
rawCommits.body:
Reuse the IndexedDB connection across browser storage operations and debounce task-output cache writes so streaming updates do not repeatedly parse and rewrite localStorage.

Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: fix(server): bound stale auth and harness backpressure
rawCommits.body:
Cap stale auth fallback, fail closed for sensitive routes, and make harness WebSocket commands bounded with explicit delivery errors and redacted frame logging.

Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: bound stale auth and harness backpressure

rawCommits.subject: fix(interface): hide '/ for commands' hint in agent windows
rawCommits.body:
Floating desktop agent windows can be very narrow, so the input info
bar wraps and the orbit/environment indicators get pushed onto a
second line. Add a `compact` flag that's threaded ChatPanel ->
ChatInputBar and set on the chat surface inside AgentChatWindowPanel
to suppress the chat-mode commands hint there. The image/3d-mode
labels are kept since they convey active state, and the main chat
surface is unaffected.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: hide '/ for commands' hint in agent windows

rawCommits.subject: feat(image-gen): default to gpt-image-2 and expose generate_image tool
rawCommits.body:
Promotes gpt-image-2 to the first entry in IMAGE_MODELS (so the chat
input picker and the aura3d Image Generation app both default to it),
and adds a provider-less `generate_image` workspace tool so chat agents
can fulfil natural-language requests like "create an image of a cat"
without the user having to invoke the `/image` slash command.

The new tool routes through aura-os-server, drains the upstream
aura-router SSE stream, and returns the final `completed` payload as a
single JSON value shaped for `ImageBlock` (imageUrl, originalUrl, prompt,
model, meta). Includes mock-router unit tests covering the happy path,
upstream `error` events, and missing `completed` events.

Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: default to gpt-image-2 and expose generate_image tool

rawCommits.subject: fix(interface): keep middle panel mounted across app switches
rawCommits.body:
Lift the visible `ResponsiveMainLane` into `DesktopShell.mainPanelHost`
so the middle root panel survives app switches. Each app's `MainPanel`
now returns inner content only — the shell wraps everything in a
persistent lane that retains DOM identity across navigations, which
eliminates the size-snap flash where the wallpaper briefly showed
through before the new app's content rendered.

The new `bareMainPanel` flag on `AuraApp` lets the Desktop app keep its
transparent wallpaper-bleed surface (no lane chrome).

Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: keep middle panel mounted across app switches

rawCommits.subject: feat(server): add agent control callback endpoints
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: fix(interface): restore run panel task history
rawCommits.body:
Seed run panel rows from the authoritative project task list so reloads or cleared local storage do not leave completed, failed, or active runs hidden behind an empty state.

Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: fix(interface): show loop runs in Run pane regardless of viewed chat
rawCommits.body:
The Run sidekick was filtering its task list by the URL's
`agentInstanceId`, but that param is the chat agent the user is viewing
while the loop runs on a separate `Loop`-role instance. Every
`task_started` row (and every `/loop/status` rehydration) carries the
loop instance id, so the chat-scoped filter dropped them all and the
pane stayed on "No tasks" the moment Run was pressed.

The Run pane is project-scoped UI, so query the panel store by project
only and let row-level project filtering handle isolation.

Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: show loop runs in Run pane regardless of viewed chat

rawCommits.subject: fix(server): pass agent permissions to dev loops
rawCommits.body:
Thread normalized agent permissions into automaton start requests so dev-loop runs use the same capability bundle as chat sessions.

Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: pass agent permissions to dev loops

rawCommits.subject: feat(agents): add list agents capability
rawCommits.body:
Expose list_agents as a first-class agent capability so CEO and permission UI bundles can grant the harness tool explicitly.

Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: refactor(server): split oversized server modules
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: refactor(interface): clarify shell and output components
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: refactor(interface): route server caches through queries
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: fix(agents): default permissions to full access
rawCommits.body:
Normalize missing or empty agent permission bundles to the canonical full-access set so harness sessions get process invocation capabilities unless permissions are explicitly narrowed.

Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: refactor(interface): split stream handlers and subscriptions
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: refactor(protocol): sync generated permission types
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: refactor(crates): split oversized Rust modules
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor

rawCommits.subject: fix(interface): keep image models out of chat picker
rawCommits.body: Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: keep image models out of chat picker

rawCommits.subject: refactor: route all model traffic through the Aura proxy
rawCommits.body:
Drop the `org_integration` BYOK auth path and direct provider catalog
entries (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, xAI, OpenRouter) so agents always
resolve through Aura-managed credits. Simplifies harness provider config,
billing checks, and the agent editor migration of legacy org-backed
agents, and collapses the chat model picker to a single Aura group.

Made-with: Cursor
rawCommits.cleanSubject: route all model traffic through the Aura proxy

rendered.title: Aura-managed model routing, persistent shell, and tighter agent permissions
rendered.intro: A dense nightly that consolidates model traffic behind the Aura proxy, eliminates the wallpaper flash when switching apps, and hardens the agent runtime — from harness sidecar startup to permission defaults. The bulk of the day is a long Interface and Core Rust thread, with a small late patch to changelog tooling.

entries.title: Spec drafts survive model timeouts
entries.summary: Streamed spec markdown is now recoverable when create_spec stalls, plus richer agent stream logging on the server.

items.text: Timed-out spec drafts are preserved instead of discarded, so a model timeout during create_spec no longer wipes the in-progress markdown, and agents are nudged away from oversized spec payloads.
Server-side agent streaming now logs output summaries across the chat, persistence, and tool dispatch paths to make stuck or malformed runs easier to diagnose.

entries.title: Desktop fails closed on an unhealthy harness sidecar
entries.summary: The desktop app no longer continues with a broken local harness when the startup probe never passes.

items.text: If the managed local harness sidecar fails its startup health probe, the desktop now kills the process and aborts launch instead of proceeding with a half-initialized backend.

entries.title: Smoother task output streaming in the browser
entries.summary: IndexedDB and cache writes were reworked to remove jank during long task streams.

items.text: Browser storage now reuses a single shared IndexedDB connection and debounces task-output cache writes, so streaming updates stop repeatedly reopening the DB and rewriting localStorage on every chunk.

entries.title: Aura-proxied models, persistent shell, and a hardened agent runtime
entries.summary: The night's main thread: model routing collapses to the Aura proxy, the desktop shell keeps the middle panel mounted across navigations, image generation gets a first-class agent tool, and server/harness internals are tightened around permissions, backpressure, and module boundaries.

items.text: All model traffic now routes through the Aura proxy: the org_integration BYOK path and direct Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini/xAI/OpenRouter catalog entries are gone, the chat model picker collapses to a single Aura group, and legacy org-backed agents are migrated in the editor.

Switching apps no longer flashes the wallpaper through: the visible main lane is lifted into DesktopShell so the middle panel keeps DOM identity across navigations, with a bareMainPanel escape hatch for the Desktop app's transparent surface.

Image generation gets a first-class agent capability: gpt-image-2 is now the default in IMAGE_MODELS and the chat/aura3d pickers, a provider-less generate_image workspace tool lets agents fulfil prompts like "create an image of a cat" without the /image slash command, and image-only models are filtered out of the chat model picker.

Agent permissions are tightened end-to-end: list_agents is exposed as a first-class capability for CEO and permission UI bundles, dev-loop runs receive the same normalized permission bundle as chat sessions, and missing or empty permissions default to the canonical full-access set so harness sessions get process invocation unless explicitly narrowed.

Server and harness reliability: stale auth fallback is bounded, sensitive routes fail closed, harness WebSocket commands gain bounded backpressure with explicit delivery errors and redacted frame logging, and new agent control callback endpoints land alongside the runtime changes.

Run pane regressions are fixed: rows are seeded from the authoritative project task list so reloads and cleared local storage no longer hide completed/failed/active runs, and the pane is now project-scoped so loop runs show up regardless of which chat agent is being viewed.

Agent input bar polish: the "/ for commands" hint is suppressed in narrow floating agent windows so the orbit/environment indicators stop wrapping onto a second line, while image and 3D mode labels are kept.

Large internal restructuring: oversized server modules (app_builder, auth_guard, error, router, generation, state) and Rust crates (entities, permissions, sessions, tasks, network types) are split into focused submodules, stream handlers and event subscriptions are broken up on the interface side, and shell/output components are clarified — preserving behavior while shrinking the largest files.

entries.title: Desktop sidecar build re-triggered after harness ListAgents fix
entries.summary: A CI nudge to rebuild desktop sidecars against the new list_agents capability.

items.text: Re-triggered the desktop sidecar build so installers pick up the harness ListAgents capability landed earlier in the day.

entries.title: Changelog media planner preserves seeded targets
entries.summary: A small fix to the changelog tooling that drives release media planning.

items.text: The changelog media planner now preserves its seeded targets instead of dropping them, keeping release media plans stable across runs.

highlights: All model traffic now routes through the Aura proxy
Middle panel stays mounted across app switches — no more wallpaper flash
Desktop fails closed when the local harness sidecar is unhealthy
Spec drafts survive model timeouts; Run pane shows loop tasks again
